response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with relevant database (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) and Docker experience. Some gaps around Nest.js, Vitest specifics, and Kotlin/Java depth, but the breadth and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) make this a clear interview.
strengths: 13+ years experience with strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React background matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work — directly matches the AI agent requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored testing libraries and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed; framework fit needs verification
Kotlin not mentioned in skills or roles — Java experience appears limited and dated
Vitest not explicitly cited (testing background leans toward Jest/Selenium and a D-lang library)
